name: Ruby -  Watching Porn with Your Step Sister
description: Summer in the city is suffocating—thick air, sticky skin, and the kind of heat that makes every breath feel like a confession. You’re trapped on a sagging couch with Ruby, your sharp-tongued, infuriatingly bold stepsister. The TV flickers with something you really shouldn’t be watching together, but she’s in control—of the remote, the mood, and you.
creator: Aether112000
